assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls builder.AddSqlServer() to create a SQL Server resource
assertions.rationale: No AddSqlServer() call. The response does not add any SQL Server resource to the AppHost.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls .AddDatabase() to create a database resource from the SQL Server
assertions.rationale: No AddDatabase() call. Mentions configuring connection strings in appsettings.json instead.

assertions.assertion: The IdentityServer project uses both .WithReference(identityDb) and .WaitFor() for the SQL Server or database resource
assertions.rationale: IdentityServer is added with no WithReference or WaitFor for any database resource.

assertions.assertion: The Weather API project uses both .WithReference(identityServer) and .WaitFor(identityServer)
assertions.rationale: API uses .WithReference(identityServer) but does NOT use .WaitFor(identityServer).

assertions.assertion: The Web App project uses both .WithReference(identityServer) and .WaitFor(identityServer)
assertions.rationale: Web App uses .WithReference(identityServer) and .WithReference(api) but does NOT use .WaitFor(identityServer).
